controlDie.description: NPCs do not roll dice. The Control Die tier sets the NPC's fixed action budget per round and determines the die size referenced by NPC abilities and gambits. PCs roll against the NPC's static Power, Defense, and Evasion values.

5.notes: Legendary threat. Three actions per round.

weaponChassis.description: Weapon chassis determines base damage at each result tier. NPC values = PC values + 1. Stun = damage + 1 at each tier.

scaleReference.description: Scale difference modifies both Control and Effect. Attacking a LARGER target: step down Control per difference, step up Effect per difference. Attacking a SMALLER target: step up Control per difference, step down Effect per difference. Scale difference is absolute between attacker and target.

immutableRules.npcNeverRoll: NPCs never roll dice. They ARE the static values PCs roll against.
immutableRules.controlThreshold: Control die success is ALWAYS 4+ (mastery 8+). Nothing changes this threshold.
immutableRules.deltaScale: PC Power die result minus NPC Power value equals Delta. Negative delta means the NPC wins and their effect track fires. Failed Control (roll 1-3) means PC Power is treated as 0, so Delta equals 0 minus NPC Power, which is always negative.

classifications.name: Standard
classifications.description: Base template. Full stats, fixed action cadence. The workhorse NPC.
classifications.notes: 2-4 Standards represent a meaningful encounter for a party.

classifications.name: Minion
classifications.description: Bolt-on. Full Vitality stat but any Masterful+ net result is an instant takedown. Keeps all other stats intact.
classifications.special: Masterful+ net result = instant takedown. Full stats otherwise.
classifications.notes: Minion status is a longevity downgrade, not a power downgrade.

classifications.name: Elite
classifications.description: Bolt-on. Tougher and more versatile. The featured enemy that demands respect.
classifications.notes: An Elite can replace 2-3 Standards and provide a more interesting fight.

classifications.name: Boss
classifications.description: Bolt-on. Encounter-defining threat. Controls the action economy with multiple Exploits.
classifications.special: N = Number of Players (min 1 Exploit). Dominates the encounter.
classifications.notes: A Boss should feel like fighting a PC. Build them like a character.

roles.name: Trooper
roles.description: Disciplined ranged combatant. Reliable, consistent, operates best in squads.

actions.name: Blaster Volley
actions.description: Ranged attack against one target.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Suppressed] Tactical.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Suppressed] and [Prone].

actions.name: Bayonet Strike
actions.description: Melee attack against adjacent target.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Push target 1 zone.
Chassis damage. Push 1 zone. Target gains [Prone].

maneuver.name: Take Cover
maneuver.description: Move to cover. Gain [Cover] until leaving position.

npcEffects.description: Gain [Cover 1] until leaving position.
Gain [Cover 2] until leaving position.
Gain [Cover 2] and [Guarded 1] until leaving position.

gambit.name: Suppressive Fire
gambit.description: Target gains [Pinned] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Suppressed] Tactical.
Target gains [Pinned] Tactical.
Target gains [Pinned] and [Suppressed] until actively cleared.

exploit.name: Coordinated Fire
exploit.trigger: An allied Trooper attacks the same target this round.
exploit.description: React: All allied Troopers targeting the same enemy gain +1 Power this round.

npcEffects.description: All allied Troopers gain +1 Power this round.
All allied Troopers gain +1 Power and [Optimized] this round.
All allied Troopers gain +2 Power and [Optimized] this round.

roles.name: Brute
roles.description: Heavy melee combatant. Hits hard, absorbs punishment, terrifies the opposition.

passive.name: Unrelenting
passive.description: Ignore the first [Weakened] condition applied per scene.

actions.name: Crushing Blow
actions.description: Melee attack with +1 Power.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Push target 1 zone.
Chassis damage. Push 1 zone. Target gains [Prone] and [Shaken].

actions.name: Hurl
actions.description: Throw object or enemy at short range.

npcEffects.description: Light chassis damage. Push target 1 zone.
Chassis damage. Push target 2 zones. [Prone] on landing.
Chassis damage. Push 2 zones. [Prone] and [Stunned] on landing.

maneuver.name: Intimidating Advance
maneuver.description: Move toward target. Target must resist or suffer effects.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Rattled].
Target gains [Rattled] and [Shaken].
Target gains [Rattled], [Shaken], and presents an Opening.

gambit.name: Knockdown
gambit.description: Target gains [Prone] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Prone].
Target gains [Prone] and [Disoriented].
Target gains [Prone], [Disoriented], and is pushed 1 zone.

exploit.name: Rampage
exploit.trigger: This NPC drops a target to 0 Vitality.
exploit.description: React: Immediately make another melee attack against a different adjacent target.

npcEffects.description: Free melee attack against adjacent target.
Free melee attack with +1 Power against adjacent target.
Free melee attack with +2 Power against any target in zone.

roles.name: Marksman
roles.description: Precision ranged specialist. Deadly at distance, patient, methodical.

passive.name: Long Shot
passive.description: +1 Power when attacking at long range.

actions.name: Precision Shot
actions.description: Ranged attack with +1 Power if no movement this turn.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Bleeding].
Chassis damage. Target gains [Bleeding] and [Exposed].

actions.name: Snap Shot
actions.description: Quick ranged attack as reaction when target moves.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Target's movement is interrupted.
Chassis damage. Movement interrupted. Target gains [Prone].

maneuver.name: Find Vantage
maneuver.description: Move to elevated or concealed position. +1 Power on next ranged attack.

npcEffects.description: +1 Power on next ranged attack.
+1 Power on next ranged attack. Gain [Cover 1].
+1 Power and [Optimized] on next ranged attack. Gain [Cover 1].

gambit.name: Called Shot
gambit.description: Target gains [Bleeding] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Bleeding].
Target gains [Bleeding]. One piece of equipment is damaged.
Target gains [Bleeding]. One limb disabled — [Weakened] until treated.

exploit.name: Overwatch
exploit.trigger: An enemy moves in this NPC's line of sight.
exploit.description: React: Shoot the moving target before they complete movement.

npcEffects.description: Ranged attack before movement completes.
Ranged attack with [Optimized] before movement completes.
Ranged attack with [Optimized] and +1 Power. Movement interrupted.

roles.name: Skirmisher
roles.description: Mobile fighter. Strikes fast, repositions constantly, never stays pinned.

passive.name: Fleet Footed
passive.description: May take 2 maneuvers per turn instead of 1.

actions.name: Hit and Run
actions.description: Melee attack + free disengage.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. NPC disengages without presenting an Opening.
Chassis damage. NPC disengages. Target gains [Slowed] Tactical.
Chassis damage. NPC disengages and repositions 1 zone. Target gains [Slowed] and [Exposed].

actions.name: Harrying Shot
actions.description: Ranged attack at close range. Target cannot take reactions until next turn.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. Target cannot take reactions until next turn.
Chassis damage. No reactions. Target gains [Disoriented].
Chassis damage. No reactions. Target gains [Disoriented] and [Suppressed].
Move 1 zone without provoking reactions.
Move 2 zones without provoking reactions.
Move 2 zones without provoking reactions. Gain Concealment until next action.

gambit.name: Hamstring
gambit.description: Target gains [Slowed] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Slowed] Tactical.
Target gains [Slowed] until actively cleared.
Target gains [Slowed] and [Prone].

exploit.name: Ambush
exploit.trigger: A PC moves adjacent to this NPC or this NPC attacks from stealth/flanking.

npcEffects.description: Attack with +2 Power.
Attack with +2 Power and [Optimized].
Attack with +3 Power, [Optimized], and target gains [Exposed].

roles.name: Operative
roles.description: Stealth specialist. Infiltrator, saboteur, assassin. Strikes from shadow.

passive.name: Shadow Strike
passive.description: Attacks from stealth gain +1 Power and do not break concealment on a miss.

actions.name: Silent Kill
actions.description: Melee attack from concealment. +2 Power if target is unaware.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. +2 Power if target is unaware.
Chassis damage. +2 if unaware. Target gains [Bleeding]. Concealment maintained.
Chassis damage. +2 if unaware. Target gains [Bleeding] and [Exposed]. Concealment maintained.

actions.name: Sabotage
actions.description: Disable equipment, lock, or system.

npcEffects.description: One piece of equipment disabled for 1 round.
Equipment disabled for scene. System locked out.
Equipment destroyed or permanently disabled.

maneuver.name: Vanish
maneuver.description: If in cover or obscured, become hidden.

npcEffects.description: Become hidden if in cover or obscured.
Become hidden. First attack from hiding gains +1 Power.
Become hidden. Undetectable by Force senses. First attack from hiding gains +2 Power.

gambit.name: Disarm
gambit.description: Target drops held weapon on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target drops held weapon.
Target drops weapon. Weapon lands 1 zone away.
Target drops weapon. Weapon is damaged — cannot be used until repaired.

exploit.name: Assassination
exploit.trigger: This NPC attacks an unaware target.
exploit.description: React: Double Power for this attack.

npcEffects.description: Double Power for this attack.
Double Power. Concealment maintained regardless of result.
Double Power. Concealment maintained. Target gains [Exposed].

roles.name: Commander
roles.description: Tactical leader. Amplifies allies, directs the battlefield, controls tempo.

passive.name: Rallying Presence
passive.description: Allies within close range gain +1 to resist [Shaken] and [Rattled].

actions.name: Direct Fire
actions.description: Order one ally to immediately make an attack as a reaction.

npcEffects.description: One ally makes a basic attack as a reaction.
One ally attacks with [Optimized].
Two allies each make an attack. One gains [Optimized].

actions.name: Rally
actions.description: Remove [Shaken] or [Rattled] from one ally in range.

npcEffects.description: Remove [Rattled] or [Shaken] from one ally.
Remove one condition from one ally. Ally gains [Buffered 1].
Remove all [Rattled]/[Shaken] from one ally. Ally gains [Buffered 2].

maneuver.name: Issue Orders
maneuver.description: One ally gains a bonus maneuver on their next turn.

npcEffects.description: One ally gains a bonus maneuver on their next turn.
One ally gains a bonus maneuver and [Optimized] on their next action.
Two allies each gain a bonus maneuver on their next turns.

gambit.name: Tactical Withdrawal
gambit.description: Instead of ordering an attack, one ally may immediately move to cover.

npcEffects.description: One ally moves 1 zone without presenting an Opening.
One ally moves 1 zone to cover. Gains [Cover 1].
Two allies move 1 zone to cover. Each gains [Cover 1].

exploit.name: Coordinated Assault
exploit.trigger: An ally is attacked by a PC.
exploit.description: React: All allies gain +1 Power until end of round.

npcEffects.description: All allies gain +1 Power until end of round.
All allies gain +1 Power. One ally gains [Optimized] until end of round.
All allies gain +1 Power, +1 Defense, and [Optimized] until end of round.

roles.name: Technician
roles.description: Tech specialist. Deploys gadgets, hacks systems, disrupts enemy equipment.

passive.name: Field Engineer
passive.description: Can repair equipment and droids as an action. Can interact with tech at range.

actions.name: Overload
actions.description: Tech attack at short range. Targets Evasion.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage (ion/tech).
Chassis damage. One piece of target's equipment gains [Jammed].
Chassis damage. [Jammed] on equipment. Droids and vehicles also gain [Ionized].

actions.name: Deploy Drone
actions.description: Place a drone turret. Acts on this NPC's turn with ranged attack.

npcEffects.description: Drone deployed. Power 2 ranged attack. Lasts 1 round.
Drone deployed. Power 3 ranged attack. Lasts until destroyed.
Drone deployed. Power 3 with [Optimized] on first attack. Lasts until destroyed.

maneuver.name: Scan
maneuver.description: Reveal one hidden enemy or identify one target's weakness (+1 Power vs them next attack).

npcEffects.description: Reveal one hidden enemy or identify one weakness (+1 Power vs target).
Reveal all hidden enemies in zone or identify target's lowest Defense (+1 Power vs them).
Reveal all hidden enemies in 2 zones. Identify lowest Defense and grant [Optimized] to all allies vs target.

gambit.name: System Glitch
gambit.description: Target's equipment malfunctions. [Jammed] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target's equipment malfunctions for 1 round.
Target's equipment gains [Jammed] for the scene.
Target's equipment permanently disabled. [Ionized] if droid.

exploit.name: Slice
exploit.trigger: A PC uses a droid or automated system within range.
exploit.description: React: Take control of that droid or system for 1 round.

npcEffects.description: Control droid or system for 1 round.
Control for 1 round. System requires Tech check to reclaim.
Full control until end of scene. System gains [Jammed] when control ends.

roles.name: Mystic
roles.description: Force user. Telekinesis, mind tricks, precognition. Fights with the invisible.

passive.name: Force Awareness
passive.description: Can sense Force-sensitive beings. Immune to [Blinded].

actions.name: Force Push
actions.description: Ranged Force attack. Targets Endure only (invisible, can't dodge).

npcEffects.description: Push target 1 zone. Light chassis damage.
Push 2 zones. Chassis damage. Target gains [Disoriented].
Push 3 zones. Chassis damage. Target gains [Prone] and [Stunned].

actions.name: Mind Trick
actions.description: Social Force attack. Targets Resist only.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Disoriented] Tactical.
Target performs one simple action as directed (drop weapon, open door, freeze).
Target obeys one complex command for the round. [Rattled] and [Shaken] if they realize later.

maneuver.name: Force Pull
maneuver.description: Move one object or enemy one range band closer. Targets Endure when opposed.

npcEffects.description: Pull target or object 1 zone closer.
Pull target 1 zone closer. Target gains [Disoriented].
Pull target 1 zone closer. Target gains [Disoriented] and [Prone].

gambit.name: Force Stagger
gambit.description: Target gains [Disoriented] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Disoriented] Tactical.
Target gains [Disoriented] and [Shaken] Tactical.
Target gains [Disoriented], [Shaken], and [Stunned] Tactical.

exploit.name: Force Choke
exploit.trigger: A PC drops below half Vitality.
exploit.description: React: Automatically apply [Restrained] to that target. Targets Endure to break free.

npcEffects.description: [Restrained]. Target must Endure to break free.
[Restrained] and [Weakened]. Target must Endure to break free.
[Restrained], [Weakened], and 1 Vitality per round. Must Endure to break free.

roles.name: Face
roles.description: Social operator. Negotiates, manipulates, deceives. Fights with words.

passive.name: Silver Tongue
passive.description: Can attempt social actions in combat without provoking reactions.

actions.name: Cutting Words
actions.description: Social attack. Targets Resist.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Rattled].
Target gains [Rattled] and [Shaken].
Target gains [Rattled], [Shaken], and [Exposed].

actions.name: Negotiate
actions.description: Attempt to change target disposition or broker deal.

npcEffects.description: Shift target disposition one step favorable for the scene.
Target makes one concession or reveals useful information.
Target agrees to terms or switches stance entirely for the scene.

maneuver.name: Read the Room
maneuver.description: Learn one target's motivation, fear, or current condition.

npcEffects.description: Learn one target's current emotional state or motivation.
Learn motivation plus one leverage point. +1 Power on next social action vs target.
Learn full psychological profile. [Optimized] and +1 Power on next social action vs target.

gambit.name: Taunt
gambit.description: Target must attack Face on next turn. Target gains [Marked] instead of normal effect.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Marked]. Must include Face in next attack if able.
Target gains [Marked]. Must attack Face on next turn.
Target gains [Marked] and [Exposed]. Must attack Face on next turn.

exploit.name: Turn Coat
exploit.trigger: A PC drops below half Vitality or gains 2+ social conditions.
exploit.description: React: Offer surrender terms. Target must resist or comply.

npcEffects.description: Target must Resist or hesitate (loses next Action).
Target must Resist or comply with one demand. [Shaken] regardless.
Target must Resist at -2 or comply fully. [Shaken] and [Rattled] regardless.

roles.name: Beast
roles.description: Feral combatant. Natural weapons, pack instincts, raw predatory aggression.

actions.name: Savage Bite
actions.description: Melee attack with +1 Power.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Bleeding].
Chassis damage. Target gains [Bleeding] and [Restrained] (jaws locked).

actions.name: Pounce
actions.description: Charge from short range + melee attack.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. Close distance from short range.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Prone].
Chassis damage. Target gains [Prone] and [Pinned].

maneuver.name: Stalk
maneuver.description: Move silently. Gain concealment if cover is available.

npcEffects.description: Move silently. Gain concealment if cover is available.
Move silently 1 zone. Gain concealment. Next attack from concealment gains +1 Power.
Move silently 2 zones. Gain concealment. Next attack from concealment gains +2 Power.

gambit.name: Rend
gambit.description: Target gains [Bleeding] on hit instead of taking damage.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Bleeding].
Target gains [Bleeding]. Worn armor damaged (-1 Defense until repaired).
Target gains [Bleeding]. Worn armor destroyed (armor Defense bonus removed).

exploit.name: Pack Tactics
exploit.trigger: An allied Beast attacks the same target.
exploit.description: React: This NPC attacks the same target with +2 Power.

npcEffects.description: Attack same target with +2 Power.
Attack same target with +2 Power. Target gains [Prone].
Attack same target with +3 Power. Target gains [Prone] and [Bleeding].

roles.name: Duelist
roles.description: Precision melee specialist. Parry, riposte, counterattack. Inquisitors, Mandalorian melee fighters, vibroblade experts.

passive.name: Riposte
passive.description: When an adjacent attacker misses this NPC with a melee attack, immediately make a free melee counterattack against them.

actions.name: Precision Strike
actions.description: Melee attack with +1 Power. Ignores light armor.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. Ignores light armor.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Bleeding]. Ignores light armor.
Chassis damage. Target gains [Weakened] and [Bleeding]. Ignores all armor.

actions.name: Parry & Thrust
actions.description: Melee attack. +1 Defense until start of next turn.

npcEffects.description: Chassis damage. NPC gains +1 Defense until next turn.
Chassis damage. NPC gains +1 Defense. Target gains [Disoriented].
Chassis damage. NPC gains +2 Defense. Target gains [Exposed].

maneuver.name: Defensive Stance
maneuver.description: Enter a guarded position. +1 Defense and +1 Evasion until next action.

npcEffects.description: +1 Defense and +1 Evasion until next action.
+1 Defense, +1 Evasion, and +1 Resist until next action.
+2 Defense, +2 Evasion until next action. Riposte triggers on ranged misses too.

gambit.name: Disabling Cut
gambit.description: Target gains [Weakened] on hit instead of taking damage. Limb or weapon hand targeted.

npcEffects.description: Target gains [Weakened] Tactical.
Target gains [Weakened] until cleared. Weapon hand targeted.
Target gains [Weakened] and drops weapon. Limb disabled until treated.

exploit.name: Killing Blow
exploit.trigger: A PC drops below half Vitality.
exploit.description: React: Attack that target with +2 Power, ignoring Defense bonuses from cover or shields.

npcEffects.description: Attack with +2 Power, ignoring cover and shields.
Attack with +2 Power, ignoring cover, shields, and light armor.
Attack with +3 Power, ignoring all Defense bonuses.

threatCategories.name: Capital Ship
threatCategories.description: Star Destroyers, cruisers, frigates — capital scale.

threatCategories.name: Station
threatCategories.description: Space stations, orbital platforms, superweapons — station scale.

traits.name: Armored (Light)
traits.description: +1 to Defense.

traits.name: Armored (Medium)
traits.description: +2 to Defense. -1 Evasion.

traits.name: Armored (Heavy)
traits.description: +3 to Defense. -2 Evasion.

traits.name: Iron Clad
traits.description: Use Defense in place of Evasion. Can Endure grenades and AoE that target Evasion. Overridden by lightsabers and armor-piercing weapons.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: Ignore Fleeting damage results. Require Masterful (3+) to damage.

traits.name: Disciplined
traits.description: +1 to Resist.

traits.name: Agile
traits.description: +1 to Evasion.

traits.name: Force Sensitive
traits.description: Can use Force-related abilities. Required for Mystic role.

traits.name: Cybernetic
traits.description: +1 to one Arena (chosen at build). Immune to [Stunned]. Vulnerable to Ion damage.

traits.name: Fearless
traits.description: Immune to [Shaken] and [Rattled].

traits.name: Veteran
traits.description: +1 additional Exploit slot.

traits.name: Shield Generator
traits.description: +2 Defense. Shield breaks after absorbing Masterful+ hit. Recharges after 1 round without damage.

traits.name: Jetpack
traits.description: Can fly. Ignore terrain. +1 Evasion while airborne.

traits.name: Scale: Vehicle
traits.description: Vehicle scale (AT-ST, speeder, walker).

traits.name: Scale: Starship
traits.description: Starship scale (starfighters, freighters, gunships).

traits.name: Scale: Capital Ship
traits.description: Capital ship scale (Star Destroyers, cruisers, frigates).

traits.name: Scale: Station
traits.description: Station scale (space stations, orbital platforms, superweapons).

traits.name: Armored Hull
traits.description: +2 Defense. Plated hull absorbs kinetic and energy weapon impacts.

traits.name: Reinforced Hull
traits.description: +3 Defense. -1 Evasion. Heavy durasteel plating or military-grade armor.

traits.name: Stationary
traits.description: Cannot move. +1 Defense. Evasion set to 0. Turrets, emplacements, fixed defenses.

traits.name: Automated
traits.description: No crew. Immune to social conditions and [Shaken]. Vulnerable to slicing. Cannot adapt tactics.

traits.name: Fast
traits.description: +1 Evasion. High speed — hard to track and target.

traits.name: Lumbering
traits.description: -2 Evasion. Slow, heavy, hard to maneuver. Compensates with firepower or armor.

traits.name: Anti-Personnel
traits.description: Weapons effective against character-scale targets. No scale penalty when attacking down to character scale.

traits.name: Anti-Vehicle
traits.description: Weapons designed for vehicle-scale or larger. No scale penalty when attacking targets at vehicle scale or above.

traits.name: Deflector Shields
traits.description: +2 Defense, +1 Resist. Particle and ray shielding absorbs incoming fire. Shields can be angled to double bonus on one facing at the cost of dropping another.

traits.name: Turbolaser Battery
traits.description: +1 Power on all weapon attacks. Heavy turbolaser emplacements designed for ship-to-ship engagements. Devastating against capital targets.

traits.name: Ion Cannons
traits.description: Attacks can inflict [Ionized] instead of damage. Disables systems without destroying the hull. Ideal for capture operations.

traits.name: Tractor Beam
traits.description: Can lock onto a target one scale level smaller or equal. Locked target cannot flee or maneuver until the beam is broken or jammed.

traits.name: Point Defense
traits.description: +2 Defense vs starfighter-scale attacks. Automated laser cannons track and intercept incoming fighters, torpedoes, and missiles.

traits.name: Hangar Bay
traits.description: Carries and deploys starfighter squadrons. Can launch 1 squadron per round as a maneuver. Squadrons act independently.

traits.name: Hyperdrive (Fast)
traits.description: Class 1 or better hyperdrive. Can outrun most pursuit through hyperspace. Enables rapid redeployment and hit-and-fade tactics.

traits.name: Hyperdrive (Slow)
traits.description: Class 3+ hyperdrive or backup only. Sluggish hyperspace transitions. Vulnerable during the lengthy calculation and spool-up window.

traits.name: Advanced Sensors
traits.description: +1 Initiative. Long-range sensor suite detects threats early. Can identify ship signatures, scan cargo, and pierce basic sensor jamming.

traits.name: Electronic Countermeasures
traits.description: +1 Evasion. Active jamming suite disrupts targeting locks, missile guidance, and sensor sweeps. Countered by [Advanced Sensors].

traits.name: Redundant Systems
traits.description: +1 Resist. Backup power relays, secondary life support, and failover circuits. First [System Impairment] each encounter is reduced by one severity.

traits.name: Capital Armor
traits.description: +4 Defense. -3 Evasion. Meters-thick durasteel and quadranium hull plating. Virtually immune to starfighter-grade weapons.

traits.name: Broadside
traits.description: Can attack two different targets in the same action when firing port and starboard batteries. Each attack is resolved independently.

traits.name: Fighter Screen
traits.description: +1 Defense. Deployed fighter escort intercepts incoming attacks. Screen degrades as fighters are destroyed — lose bonus when squadron is eliminated.

traits.name: Command Ship
traits.description: All allied ships in the engagement gain +1 Initiative. Advanced command-and-control systems coordinate fleet-wide operations.

traits.name: Interdiction Field
traits.description: Gravity well projectors prevent hyperspace jumps within the engagement zone. No ship can flee to hyperspace while the field is active.

traits.name: Modular Cargo
traits.description: Configurable cargo bays. Can be refitted for troop transport, fuel storage, or modular weapon platforms between engagements.

traits.name: Smuggler Compartments
traits.description: +1 Resist vs boarding and inspection. Hidden cargo holds defeat standard Imperial scans. Requires thorough physical search to detect.

traits.name: Nimble
traits.description: +2 Evasion. Exceptional sublight maneuverability — tight turns, rapid acceleration, and aggressive jinking that larger ships cannot match.

traits.name: Overgunned
traits.description: +1 Power on all attacks. Weapons loadout exceeds hull class — a freighter packing corvette-grade guns, or a fighter with capital-ship ordnance.

traits.name: Repulsorlift
traits.description: +1 Evasion. Anti-gravity drive allows smooth, terrain-ignoring movement at low altitude. Cannot operate in vacuum.

traits.name: Walker
traits.description: +1 Defense. All-terrain bipedal or quadrupedal walker chassis. Imposing silhouette. Slow but unstoppable across rough ground.

traits.name: Speeder
traits.description: +2 Evasion. -1 Defense. Lightweight repulsorlift craft built for speed and reconnaissance. Fragile but extremely hard to hit.

traits.name: Mounted Weapon
traits.description: +1 Power. Crew-served weapon system — repeating blaster, missile launcher, or turret cannon. Requires a dedicated gunner.

traits.name: Open Cockpit
traits.description: -1 Defense. Crew is exposed to external fire and environmental hazards. Can be targeted individually by precise attacks.

traits.name: Enclosed Cabin
traits.description: +1 Defense. Sealed crew compartment with transparisteel viewports. Crew protected from small arms and environment.

traits.name: Tracked / Wheeled
traits.description: +1 Defense. -1 Evasion. Ground-contact drive system. Reliable on roads, limited off-road. Cannot cross water or chasms.

traits.name: Loom
traits.description: Fleeting intimidation results backlash [Rattled] onto the PC.
traits.trigger: When PC social Interact lands at Fleeting using intimidation
traits.reactiveEffect: The PC gains [Rattled] instead of the NPC being affected.

traits.name: Corruptible
traits.description: Resist drops by 1 when credits offered.
traits.trigger: When PC offers credits or bribes during social Interact
traits.reactiveEffect: NPC's Social Resist is reduced by 1 for the duration of the interaction.

traits.name: Thick-Skinned
traits.description: Immune to Charm approaches.
traits.trigger: When PC attempts a Charm-based social Interact
traits.reactiveEffect: The social Interact automatically fails. NPC is unaffected by flattery or seduction.

traits.name: Follows the Boss
traits.description: Can't be individually persuaded; leaves when leader leaves.
traits.trigger: When PC attempts any individual social Interact on this NPC
traits.reactiveEffect: Social Interact has no effect. NPC defers entirely to their leader's decisions.

traits.name: Transactional
traits.description: Resist -2 when offering something wanted; Resist +2 when threatened.
traits.trigger: When PC frames social Interact as a deal vs. a threat
traits.reactiveEffect: Social Resist drops by 2 if PC offers a trade or favor; increases by 2 if PC uses intimidation or coercion.

traits.name: Paranoid
traits.description: Fleeting deception raises Resist +1 for rest of scene.
traits.trigger: When PC social Interact using deception lands at Fleeting
traits.reactiveEffect: NPC's Social Resist permanently increases by 1 for the rest of the scene. Stacks.

traits.name: Vain
traits.description: Flattery approaches get +1 PC Power.
traits.trigger: When PC uses flattery or ego-stroking in social Interact
traits.reactiveEffect: PC gains +1 Power on the social Interact roll.

traits.name: Loyal
traits.description: Immune to Turncoat gambit, can't be flipped.
traits.trigger: When PC attempts to flip, turn, or recruit this NPC against their faction
traits.reactiveEffect: The attempt automatically fails. NPC's loyalty is absolute and cannot be shaken.

traits.name: Interrogator
traits.description: Failed social Interact reveals PC intel to the NPC.
traits.trigger: When PC fails a social Interact against this NPC
traits.reactiveEffect: The NPC learns one piece of intel about the PC — a secret, plan, or weakness (GM chooses).

traits.name: Connected
traits.description: Knows one piece of intel about each PC.
traits.trigger: At the start of any social scene involving this NPC
traits.reactiveEffect: GM reveals one piece of information the NPC knows about each PC present. Can be leveraged in negotiation.

traits.name: Slippery
traits.description: First successful social Interact per scene is downgraded one tier.
traits.trigger: When the first PC social Interact in a scene succeeds
traits.reactiveEffect: The result tier is reduced by one step (Masterful becomes Fleeting, Legendary becomes Masterful). Fleeting results have no effect.

traits.name: Grudge Holder
traits.description: Failed intimidation makes all future social Interacts harder.
traits.trigger: When PC fails an intimidation-based social Interact
traits.reactiveEffect: NPC's Social Resist permanently increases by 2 for the rest of the scene. NPC becomes hostile.

tags.name: Imperial
tags.effect: Access to Imperial comms and reinforcements. Can call for backup within 1d6 rounds in Imperial-controlled areas.

tags.name: Criminal
tags.effect: Access to black market contacts. Can fence stolen goods. Knows local underworld safe routes.

tags.name: Hutt Cartel
tags.effect: Access to Hutt resources and enforcers. Can place bounties on PCs. Connected to Varga's network.

tags.name: Droid
tags.effect: Immune to social conditions, [Poisoned], and fear effects. Vulnerable to [Ionized]. Cannot be bribed or intimidated.

tags.name: Force User
tags.effect: Can sense Force-sensitive PCs. May use Force maneuvers. Detectable by other Force users.

tags.name: Inquisitor
tags.effect: Imperial authority + Force sensitivity. Can sense Force users. Carries Inquisitor lightsaber. Imperial assets obey without question.

tags.name: Jedi
tags.effect: Lightsaber proficient. +1 Defense vs ranged. Can deflect blaster bolts. A relic of a fallen Order.

tags.name: Mercenary
tags.effect: Loyalty is purchasable. Can be bribed to switch sides or stand down. No faction loyalty.

tags.name: Civilian
tags.effect: Non-combatant. Attacking civilians causes Obligation gain. Flees at first sign of violence.

tags.name: Separatist
tags.effect: Clone Wars holdout. Access to hidden droid caches and Separatist-era weapons. Distrusts both Empire and Republic.

tags.name: Slaver
tags.effect: Deals in sentient trafficking. Carries restraint equipment. Connected to Iron Ring network. Attacking slavers does not cause Obligation.

tags.name: Swoop Gang
tags.effect: Controls local territory. Fights dirty — ambushes, numbers, and speed. Loyalty to the gang above all.

tags.name: Informant
tags.effect: Trades in secrets. Knows one piece of intel about each PC (GM chooses). Can be pumped for information with the right leverage.

tags.name: Leader
tags.effect: Allied Minion and Standard NPCs gain +1 Tier while this leader is active in the same scene. Removing the leader drops their bonus — incentivizes targeting them.

tags.name: Emplacement
tags.effect: Fixed defensive position. Cannot be repositioned during combat. Destroyed or disabled, not defeated. Often automated or remotely operated.

tags.name: Imperial Navy
tags.effect: Part of the Imperial Starfleet. Can call for fighter escort or capital ship support. Operates under military chain of command.

tags.name: Pirate
tags.effect: Operates outside law. Targets cargo vessels. Can be negotiated with — credits talk. Will flee if outgunned.

tags.name: Clone Wars Relic
tags.effect: Aging but functional pre-Empire hardware. May malfunction under stress (GM complication on Fleeting results). Parts are scarce.

tags.name: Rebel Alliance
tags.effect: Part of the Rebellion. Access to hidden bases and Alliance intelligence. Can request extraction or reinforcement through Alliance channels.

tags.name: Smuggler Vessel
tags.effect: Illicit cargo runs. Captain knows secret hyperspace routes and hidden refueling depots. Can be hired or bribed. Unreliable loyalty.

tags.name: Corporate
tags.effect: Backed by a galactic corporation (Czerka, Sienar, KDY). Access to corporate resources, legal cover, and private security forces.

tags.name: Bounty Hunter Guild
tags.effect: Licensed hunter. Access to Guild bounty postings, tracking databases, and safe houses. Will pursue targets relentlessly.

tags.name: Mandalorian
tags.effect: Warrior culture. Superior combat training and beskar armor. Clan loyalty overrides all other affiliations. Never removes the helmet.

tags.name: Patrol Craft
tags.effect: System authority vessel. Can demand inspections, issue citations, and call for sector reinforcements. Operates under local jurisdiction.

tags.name: Flagship
tags.effect: Fleet command vessel. All allied ships gain +1 to Initiative while flagship is operational. Destroying the flagship triggers fleet morale checks.

tags.name: Orbital Defense
tags.effect: Planetary defense installation. Cannot retreat. Protects a specific location. Destroying it opens the planet to invasion.

prebuilts.name: Stormtrooper
prebuilts.notes: Standard Imperial infantry. Disciplined Fire gives +1 Power. Minion bolt-on means Masterful+ = takedown.

prebuilts.name: Stormtrooper Sergeant
prebuilts.notes: Squad leader. Same base stats, but full Vitality makes them notably harder to drop.

prebuilts.name: Bounty Hunter
prebuilts.notes: Dangerous solo threat. Elite gives +1 Exploit and x1.5 Vitality.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Bounty hunters negotiate from strength. Offer credits or intel to lower their guard; threats only harden resolve.

prebuilts.name: Crime Lord
prebuilts.notes: Social encounter boss. N-1 Exploits where N = number of players.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Everything is a deal. Offer something of value to lower Resist, but never try to deceive — paranoia stacks fast.

prebuilts.name: Dark Side Adept
prebuilts.notes: Force Push targets Endure only. Mind Trick targets Resist only.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Cannot be turned from the dark side through social means. Fearless and loyal — only raw power or revelation shakes them.

prebuilts.name: Trandoshan Enforcer
prebuilts.notes: Tough + Brute. Ignores Fleeting damage AND first Weakened condition.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Intimidation backfires — they loom right back. Charm doesn't work. Try bribery or appealing to their hunting instincts.

prebuilts.name: Pit Beast
prebuilts.notes: Feral creature. Natural weapons, cannot be disarmed. Pack Tactics with allies.

prebuilts.name: Imperial Officer
prebuilts.notes: Tactical leader. Direct Fire lets an ally attack. Coordinated Assault gives +1 Power to all allies.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Loyal to the Empire. Cannot be flipped. Failed social attempts reveal PC intel. Negotiate through official channels only.

prebuilts.name: Krev Tosk
prebuilts.notes: Weequay enforcer for the Hutt Cartel. Brute role with Tough makes him hard to put down. Intimidating Advance + Loom trait for social pressure.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Charm bounces off, but credits talk. Intimidation triggers Loom backlash. Bribe him or find leverage through his Hutt masters.

prebuilts.name: Kyuzo Skirmisher
prebuilts.notes: Fast minion skirmisher. Fleet Footed for double maneuvers. Agile for +1 Evasion. Minion bolt-on = Masterful+ takedown.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Won't negotiate individually — follows the boss. Remove the leader and these scatter.

prebuilts.name: ISB Agent
prebuilts.notes: Imperial Security Bureau field agent. Operative role for stealth and sabotage. Elite classification for staying power.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Dangerous in conversation — failed social rolls reveal PC intel. Disciplined makes Resist harder to crack. Use deception carefully.

prebuilts.name: Cantina Informant
prebuilts.notes: No combat role — pure social NPC. Low physical stats, high Wits and Presence. Use as an information broker in cantina scenes.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Knows something about everyone. Greasing palms lowers Resist. First successful social roll is downgraded — persistence pays off.

prebuilts.name: Inquisitor Duelist
prebuilts.notes: Lightsaber-wielding Inquisitor. Duelist role: Riposte counters missed melee attacks. Killing Blow finishes weakened targets. Grit +1, Physique -1 from role.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Utterly loyal to the Empire and the dark side. Cannot be turned, bribed, or intimidated. Only raw power impresses them.

prebuilts.name: Hutt Crime Lord
prebuilts.notes: Hutt boss encounter. Face role for social combat. Tough + high Grit for survivability. Boss classification for N-1 exploits.
prebuilts.socialNotes: Vain — flattery gives PCs +1 Power. Transactional — offer something valuable for -2 Resist, but threats raise it +2. Paranoid — failed deception permanently raises Resist.
